title: Amtech V0400 115mm 80 grit flap disc
features: HARD WEARING: This 80 grit flap disc is made from high quality aluminium oxide construction certified to EN13743 for durability
NO BACKING PAD REQUIRED: Suitable for 115mm angle grinders with a 22mm bore and a max 13,300 rpm, it does not need a backing pad
GARDEN ESSENTIAL: A must-have for all types of garden maintenance
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 22mm Flap Disc (80 Grit) See more
